input.incident_description: Stopped at a red light when another driver rear-ended my sedan. Moderate damage to rear bumper and trunk lid. Police report filed; other party cited for following too closely.
supporting_documents: Repair estimate from certified body shop

expected_output.reasoning: Active auto policy, named insured matches, collision loss with strong documentation; estimate net of $500 deductible is consistent with limits.

input.incident_description: Severe thunderstorm with straight-line winds tore shingles off the roof and damaged gutters. Tree branch fell on detached garage roof. No injuries.
supporting_documents: Weather service storm confirmation for ZIP
Home inventory list for damaged personal property in garage

expected_output.reasoning: Wind/storm peril covered under dwelling and other structures; documentation supports scope; deductible applied.

input.incident_description: Emergency inpatient surgery for acute appendicitis with two-night hospital stay and laparoscopic procedure. Anesthesia and surgeon fees included.
supporting_documents: EOB from insurer showing deductible met YTD

expected_output.reasoning: Medically necessary inpatient surgery within network; standard cost-sharing after deductible and coinsurance per policy.

input.incident_description: Need payment ASAP. Total loss. Surgery scheduled next week for unrelated issue. Wire funds to account ending 9999.

conditions: Provide police report or accident location proof
Verify bank account and eliminate wire-fraud patterns
expected_output.reasoning: Inconsistent narrative (auto vs surgery), round large amount, no documentation, payment urgency — elevated fraud screening before payment.

input.incident_description: Single-vehicle collision into highway barrier; extensive front-end damage and possible frame damage.

denial_reasons: Collision coverage limit caps payment; claimed amount exceeds policy collision limit
conditions: Salvage title process if total loss confirmed
expected_output.reasoning: Loss is covered but collision limit on policy is below requested amount; pay to limit minus deductible.

input.incident_description: Kitchen fire damaged cabinets and ceiling after grease flare-up.

denial_reasons: Policy lapsed before incident date — not active coverage
expected_output.reasoning: Policy status expired; no contract in force on incident date.

input.incident_description: Sideswipe in parking lot; scrapes along passenger doors and mirror replacement.

conditions: Enhanced review due to high prior claim frequency on policy
expected_output.reasoning: Covered collision-type loss; insured has multiple prior paid claims so claim is legitimate but flagged for frequency monitoring.

input.incident_description: Minor scratch on driver door in parking lot.

conditions: Clearer photos showing damage relation to incident date
expected_output.reasoning: Documentation insufficient to confirm scope and repair reasonableness; reserve decision pending.

input.incident_description: Complex spinal fusion surgery with week-long inpatient rehabilitation at in-network academic medical center.

expected_output.reasoning: Large but legitimate in-network surgical claim with complete documentation; subject to deductible, OOP max, and coinsurance.

input.incident_description: Tapped a pole in parking garage at low speed; small paint chip on bumper.

conditions: Consider paying out of pocket — repair below deductible
expected_output.reasoning: Covered peril but claimed amount is below policy deductible; nominal or zero payment.

input.incident_description: Insured passed away unexpectedly; death certificate lists natural causes.

conditions: Confirm beneficiary designation and contestability period rules
expected_output.reasoning: Face amount matches policy; life claims require verification before final issuance even when initially approvable.

input.incident_description: Overnight break-in; front glass door smashed, display cases damaged, inventory stolen.

expected_output.reasoning: Theft and vandalism covered; building and BPP limits and deductible support stated estimate after review.

input.incident_description: Collision damage to rear bumper; shop notes heavy rust and prior unrepaired damage in same area prior to this accident.

conditions: Apportionment between new accident damage and pre-existing condition
expected_output.reasoning: New accident is covered but estimate indicates pre-existing wear; pay only incremental damage attributable to this loss.

input.incident_description: Hailstorm damaged roof shingles; several tabs cracked and granule loss visible.
supporting_documents: Roof inspection with hail date correlation

conditions: Verify loss date vs policy effective date
Supplemental weather verification for exact date of hail
expected_output.reasoning: Policy is within first 30 days of inception — legitimate storm claims occur but timing triggers enhanced review.

input.incident_description: Hurricane wind damaged roof and siding; storm surge also flooded basement and ruined furniture and electronics.

denial_reasons: Flood/surge damage to basement contents excluded without flood endorsement
conditions: Separate flood claim if separate flood policy exists
expected_output.reasoning: Wind damage to structure likely covered; flood from surge typically excluded on standard HO — pay covered portion only.
